title: SPD 1153 Parking Design — Pump Track Relocation and Westside Trail
summary: Mary Robinson presents items 14-16 for engineering design of two new parking lots at 115 South Geddes and 1171 West Fayette/Magnolia plus pedestrian access across an abandoned railroad bridge ($150K bond). Eric Annis (chief development officer) addresses community concerns about eliminating the existing pump track at Light Park — commits to building a new, improved pump track nearby alongside the Westside Trail connecting downtown to the near westside and Tip Hill. Councilor Caldwell suggests alternative parking near Ukrainian National Home that was previously dismissed as too far but is the same distance. Administration agrees to investigate before Monday.
